global.description: The ad features a modern, abstract design with bold text elements and a clear call to action.
global.main_message: Encouraging users to start binge-watching with a free trial.

elements.label: Ad background
elements.description: Full canvas background of the mobile advertisement.

elements.label: Central graphic element
elements.description: A large, abstract shape in the center of the ad, possibly a rounded rectangle with a soft gradient.

elements.label: Secondary graphic element
elements.description: A smaller, rounded shape positioned slightly above the central graphic, featuring a subtle color variation.

elements.label: Overlay shape
elements.description: A rectangular shape overlaying the central graphic, providing a contrasting color that enhances visibility.

elements.label: Bottom decorative element
elements.description: A small circular shape located towards the bottom of the ad, adding visual interest.

elements.label: Mid graphic element
elements.description: A medium-sized rectangle positioned slightly above the bottom of the ad, possibly serving as a background for text.

elements.label: Brand name
elements.description: Bold, large text at the top of the ad stating 'FluxStream UGC', designed to grab attention.

elements.label: Main message
elements.description: A prominent text line in the center of the ad that reads 'Binge starts now Start free today', inviting users to engage.
elements.text_content: Binge starts now Start free today

elements.label: Call to action
elements.description: A clear, bold button at the bottom of the ad with the text 'Install now', encouraging immediate action.

embedding_texts.layout_text: The headline is at the top, the main message is centered, and the CTA is at the bottom.
